## Feature Summary
A clear description of the requested feature.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? Which EU regulation or security gap does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## Regulatory Context
- [ ] Related to GDPR
- [ ] Related to NIS2
- [ ] Related to DORA
- [ ] Related to EU AI Act
- [ ] Related to DAO/Web3 governance

## Priority
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Additional Context
Add any other context or references here.
